{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Incarnation transformation
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Incarnations]] are most dangerous at the instant they begin their transformation.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|During transformation, [[Incarnations]] feel an overwhelming compulsion to act according to their [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
